values.name: Critical
values.use_when: the argument would materially collapse or change without this chapter.

values.name: Important
values.use_when: the chapter does significant work but is not singularly decisive.

values.name: Supporting
values.use_when: the chapter helps sustain or clarify the argument.

values.name: Peripheral
values.use_when: the chapter is tangential or locally useful rather than central.
